description_long: This object is a tall, rectangular filing cabinet with a sleek, monolithic appearance and a uniform black finish. The cabinet has a flat front and back, with perfectly straight vertical sides and a consistent width from top to bottom. No visible handles, drawers, or label holders are present on the exterior, giving it a minimalist and modern look. The surface appears smooth and hard, likely constructed from metal, with a matte or slightly glossy finish. The cabinet is designed to stand upright and would typically be found in an office or archive setting for document storage. Its solid build suggests durability and security, though no locking mechanism is visible.
description: A tall, black, rectangular filing cabinet with a smooth, minimalist exterior and no visible handles or drawers. The surface is sleek and hard, likely made of metal.
description_view_0: The front view shows a flat, featureless black surface with no visible handles or drawers.
description_view_1: The side view reveals the cabinet's thin profile, emphasizing its tall and narrow shape.
description_view_2: The back view mirrors the front, displaying a flat, unadorned black surface.
description_view_3: The opposite side view again highlights the slim, vertical profile of the cabinet.
